subject: A golden-yellow mechanical soldier construct (Yotian Soldier) hefting a large pickaxe-shaped weapon over its shoulder, standing on sandy ground with distant pale figures or structures in a desert haze behind it
description: A burnished gold automaton dominates the frame, its plated body articulated like segmented armor with a domed, helm-like head and rounded pauldrons. The construct grips a heavy pickaxe-like polearm in both hands, hoisted across its torso. The metal catches a warm light, reading more like polished brass than steel. Behind it the background fades into pale tan and washed-blue desert distance, with faint silhouettes of other figures or ruined structures visible through the haze. The palette is dominated by yellow-gold and dusty cream, lit flatly under a high desert sun.
foreground: Golden mechanical soldier construct gripping a pickaxe-like weapon
background: Pale tan desert plain receding into haze with faint distant figures or structures
emotion: stoic, dutiful, expressionless metal face — a tireless laborer-warrior
